name: weekly-pay-plugin
description: Codex plugin for maintaining the Onpoint Express Weekly Pay offline CRM.

interface.shortDescription: Guided maintenance for the offline transport CRM.
interface.longDescription: Helps update drivers, trucks, roster, finance, logs, and auth flows with safe, consistent changes.
defaultPrompt: Add a new finance field and wire it to CSV export.
Audit auth.js permissions and list any risky gaps.
Fix a broken page flow and explain the root cause.
